name: Yunseul

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Patch release that clears the remaining deprecated-API warnings from the [community.obsidian.md](https://community.obsidian.md) review of 0.1.1.

### Changed

- **Minimum Obsidian version bumped to 1.13.0** (was 1.7.2). Reasonable for a brand-new plugin in mid-2026; most active users are on a more recent build.
- Internal API swaps to use the current rather than the deprecated forms:
  - \`Notice#noticeEl\` → \`Notice#messageEl\` (since 1.8.7)
  - \`ButtonComponent#setWarning()\` → \`ButtonComponent#setDestructive()\` (since 1.13.0)

### Retained as designed (with explicit justification at each call site)

- Two \`fetch()\` usages in \`src/lmstudio/client.ts\`:
  - **Streaming SSE** needs \`ReadableStream\`; \`requestUrl\` buffers the body and would defeat token streaming.
  - **The "Test connection" probe** compares \`fetch\` (CORS-aware) against \`requestUrl\` (CORS-bypassing) so the failure mode "server up but CORS off in LM Studio" can be surfaced specifically. Substituting \`requestUrl\` here would silently degrade error messages to a generic "offline".

- \`PluginSettingTab#display()\` as a re-render seam in the settings tab. The replacement \`getSettingDefinitions\` API (1.13.0+) would require rewriting the settings tab from imperative DOM-building to a declarative description — tracked as a future refactor.

### No behavioral changes

278 / 278 tests pass; build clean; lint clean. Both backends behave identically to 0.1.1.

### Release artifacts signed

Provenance attestations continue via \`actions/attest-build-provenance@v1\`. Verify with \`gh attestation verify <file> --repo zaemyung/yunseul\`.

---

*Where your notes catch the light.*

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Patch release that clears every finding from the [community.obsidian.md](https://community.obsidian.md) automated review of 0.1.0.

### Changed

- Manifest description rewritten to drop the redundant plugin name and the word "Obsidian" prefix per submission rules.

### Cleaned up

- All `eslint-disable` directives either carry a written justification or are replaced with scoped config overrides (`no-restricted-globals` for the SSE-streaming layer; `@typescript-eslint/no-deprecated` for the two settings-tab seams that intentionally use `noticeEl`/`messageEl`/`display()`/`setWarning()`/`setDestructive()`).
- All unused catch bindings (`_e`, `_err`, `_renameErr`) removed — parameterless `catch {}` throughout.
- All CSS `!important` rules removed in favour of higher selector specificity.
- Inline justification comments added at every system-identity, filesystem, child-process, vault-enumeration, and clipboard call site so the reviewer can verify each use is intentional.

### Releases

- Release artifacts are now signed with GitHub artifact attestations via [`actions/attest-build-provenance@v1`](https://docs.github.com/en/actions/security-for-github-actions/using-artifact-attestations/using-artifact-attestations-to-establish-provenance-for-builds). Verify with `gh attestation verify <file> --repo zaemyung/yunseul`.

### No behavioral changes

278 / 278 tests pass; both backends (LM Studio, Claude Code subprocess) behave identically to 0.1.0.

---

*Where your notes catch the light.*

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First public release.

Yunseul (윤슬) is an Obsidian plugin for chatting with your vault. Two backends out of the box:

- **LM Studio** (and any OpenAI-compatible local server — Ollama, llama.cpp, vLLM, LocalAI). Fully offline; prompts and vault content never leave your machine.
- **Claude Code subprocess.** Rides your existing Claude Code authentication (Pro/Max OAuth, Console, Bedrock, Vertex). No API key managed by the plugin.

### Highlights

- Vault-aware retrieval (optional on-device BM25 search; clickable wikilinks back to retrieved notes).
- Streaming responses with a Stop button; multi-turn conversations persist locally per session.
- Each chat session binds to the active note so Append always lands where you started.
- Provider-aware diagnostics (Test Connection + offline banner tell you exactly what went wrong).
- Sanitized streaming render and sanitized writes to disk. External images, \`data:\` URIs, embed transclusions, and unsafe URL schemes in assistant output never silently fetch.

### Installation

**Manual install (until the community store listing is approved):**

1. Download \`main.js\`, \`manifest.json\`, and \`styles.css\` from this release.
2. Drop them into \`<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/yunseul/\`.
3. Enable in **Settings → Community plugins → Yunseul**.

Alternatively, use **BRAT** and add this repo URL to install the latest release automatically.

### Compatibility

- Obsidian **1.7.2** or newer.
- Desktop only (the Claude Code provider spawns a subprocess; mobile is on the roadmap).

### Privacy

- **LM Studio path:** fully local; nothing leaves your machine.
- **Claude Code path:** prompts + vault excerpts + retrieved chunks are sent to Anthropic via your authenticated \`claude\` CLI. See [Anthropic's privacy policy](https://www.anthropic.com/legal/privacy).
- See README for full data-flow disclosure.

---

*Where your notes catch the light.*
